name: Meeting Preparation
description: One day before a scheduled meeting, creates a preparation task with contact background and deal context.
descriptionAr: قبل يوم من اجتماع مجدول، ينشئ مهمة تحضيرية تتضمن خلفية العميل وسياق الصفقة.

config.title: Prepare for meeting: {{title}}
config.description: Review contact history, recent communications, and deal status before the meeting.
